title: AtlaSent verifier keys (JWKS-shaped)
description: JWKS-compatible document carrying the public halves of R1–R4 signing keys with role, validity windows, optional tenant scope, and rotation/revocation flags. ADR-005 D1 keeps this a single global file in V1, with the `tenant` field reserved for V2 per-tenant trust-roots. ADR-005 D4 makes `role` required and enum-bound so R2 (permit) and R3 (audit) keys are independently revocable.

issued_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which this document was published.

keys.description: All keys ever issued (active, retired, revoked). Historical bundles need retired keys for verification; readers filter by valid_from/valid_until/revoked at verify time.

kid.description: Canonical KID. Format: ak_<yyyy>_<qN>_<tenant-shortcode>_<role-shortcode> (e.g. ak_2026_q3_acme_permit). Legacy UUID KIDs remain valid for keys provisioned before this schema.

role.description: Signing role this key is bound to. Per ADR-005 D4, R2 and R3 are distinct per tenant; the role field gates verifier acceptance.

tenant.description: Optional tenant scope. Null/absent in V1 means a global key; populated for R2/R3 per-tenant keys. Reserved for V2 per-tenant trust-roots per ADR-005 D1.

kty.description: JWK key type. V1 uses Ed25519 (OKP) for R2/R3/R4 and ECDSA P-256 (EC) for R1 cosign material; reserved EC entry is permitted.

crv.description: JWK curve. Ed25519 for OKP keys; P-256 for EC keys.

alg.description: JWA signing algorithm identifier. EdDSA for Ed25519; ES256 for P-256.

x.description: Base64url-encoded public key material. For Ed25519: 32-byte public key. For P-256: x-coordinate.

y.description: Base64url-encoded y-coordinate. Required when kty=EC; MUST be absent when kty=OKP.

valid_from.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which this key becomes valid. Verifiers reject signatures issued before this.

valid_until.description: RFC 3339 timestamp after which this key is no longer issuing. Verifiers accept signatures whose issuance time falls within [valid_from, valid_until]; this lets historical bundles verify after rotation.

replaced_by.description: KID that supersedes this one after rotation. Null when this key is current.

revoked.description: True if this KID is on the revocation list. Verifiers MUST cross-check atlasent-revocations.json; this flag is a denormalised convenience for operators reading the JWKS directly.
